description_long: This object is a whole Hass avocado with a characteristic pear-like shape, featuring a slightly bumpy, dark green skin with small, lighter green speckles. The surface texture is rough and matte, with a few minor blemishes and natural irregularities visible across the skin. At the top, a small, circular stem remnant is present, slightly recessed into the fruit. The bottom tapers to a rounded point, typical of avocados. The overall size and proportions suggest it is a medium to large specimen, likely weighing around 200 grams. The avocado is shown isolated against a white background, with no visible context or supporting surface.
description: A whole, medium-sized Hass avocado with dark green, bumpy skin and a visible stem remnant, shown isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broadest side of the avocado, highlighting its rough, dark green skin and overall teardrop shape.
description_view_1: This side view displays a slightly lighter green hue and more visible speckling, with subtle surface blemishes.
description_view_2: The top view reveals the small, circular stem remnant and the upper curvature of the avocado.
description_view_3: Another angled view of the top, emphasizing the stem area and the bumpy, textured skin.
attribute_skin_blemishes: minor dark spots and small surface irregularities
